utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 corresponding keys. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details (address, bedrooms, bathrooms, size, features, school catchment) and price — fully specified. 2) financing: includes LTV, loan amount, lender, arrangement fee, and a note on pre-approval pending an ID — terms are broadly specified; presence of pending info does not remove core terms — acceptable. 3) legal_services: provider, package, cost, timeline — specified. 4) moving_services: service type, scope, size basis, cost, time window — specified. 5) setup_services: utilities listed, cost, timing, plus structural survey with cost and schedule — specified. 6) total_budget: breakdown with line items and total, plus payment schedule and price lock — specified. Therefore, all 6/6 items are present and sufficiently detailed per the requested coverage.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final solution mentions specific items that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings: a heritage purchase property priced at CAD $750K aligns with 'Historic Townhouse'; financing is an 80% LTV traditional mortgage with CAD $1200 arrangement fee matching 'Traditional Mortgage'; legal services specify 'Premium Legal Package'; moving services specify 'Premium Moving'; setup services include 'Premium Utilities' and 'Full Structural Survey'. Map each to its rating from the ground truth.
